name: Almond Anise Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the sugars and butter until well blended.
2. Add anise seed and eggs; blend well.
3. Stir in flour, baking powder, and chopped almonds; mix well.
4. Shape the dough into two 10x1-inch rolls on a greased cookie sheet, spaced 4 inches apart.
5. Flatten each roll to a 2-inch width.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20-30 minutes or until golden brown. Cool completely.
7. Cut diagonally into 1/2 inch slices and place on ungreased cookie sheets.
8. Bake at 350°F for 6-10 minutes or until the bottom begins to brown, then turn and bake for an additional 3-5 minutes or until crisp.
9. Allow to cool completely before storing in a tightly covered container.
